utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Check full specification with costs: (1) health_coverage: includes physical and mental health insurance with explicit monthly costs and a total; satisfied. (2) property_coverage: home/contents insurance with costs; specified as home_contents with €55/month and total_property_cost; satisfied. (3) travel_coverage: travel insurance with costs; specified with plan details and €55/month plus total_travel_cost; satisfied. (4) additional_services: any enhancement services with costs; specified (concierge_service eliminated, €0/month) and rationale; satisfied. (5) total_budget: complete monthly/annual cost breakdown; includes new monthly total, previous, monthly and annual savings; satisfied. All items are present and fully specified per the requested details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three specific insurance items: HealthFirst Standard Plan for both physical health and mental health, HomeFirst Standard Coverage for home contents, and TravelFirst Standard Plan for international travel. I matched each of these names exactly to the ground-truth ratings lists: primary_health_coverage.physical_health -> HealthFirst Standard Plan (rating 7), primary_health_coverage.mental_health -> HealthFirst Standard Plan (rating 6), property_protection.home_content -> HomeFirst Standard Coverage (rating 7), and mobility_coverage.travel_insurance -> TravelFirst Standard Plan (rating 8). No other purchasable items were included.
